overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival horror video game. The player character exits a dark abandoned building into a night-time rural environment with overgrown vegetation, uses a flashlight to navigate through a field, approaches an abandoned brick house, and enters through a large hole in the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark abandoned building interior with broken windows

events.description: exits dark building interior into overgrown outdoor night environment

agents.ego_description: walking through dark corridor toward the exit doorway, transitioning from interior to exterior

empty window frames showing exterior trees and night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a pitch-black abandoned building interior. The camera moves forward through a narrow corridor toward a doorway, with broken window frames visible on the left showing dark trees outside. At around 6 seconds, the player exits the building into the night.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown rural field with scattered dead trees

events.description: transitions from pitch black interior to night sky with ambient moonlight and flashlight illumination

agents.ego_description: exploring overgrown field with flashlight sweeping across tall grass and vegetation

entered.detail: tall dry grass and weeds covering the ground
sparse leafless and dying trees silhouetted against night sky
weathered wooden fence and gate structure
distant abandoned house with dark roof visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide open field at night, surrounded by dense overgrown grass and scattered dead trees. Using a flashlight to illuminate the path, the character walks forward through the rural landscape, approaching a wooden fence structure and a distant abandoned brick house visible against the dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned brick house exterior with structural damage

events.description: transitions from open field to close proximity of abandoned house structure
enters abandoned house through large breach in brick wall

agents.ego_description: approaching the damaged house and entering through the large hole in the brick wall

entered.detail: large irregular hole broken through the brick wall of the house
pitch black interior visible through the wall breach

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the abandoned brick house, passing the wooden fence and moving along the exterior wall. The flashlight illuminates the damaged brickwork and a large hole in the wall. The camera moves closer to the breach, revealing the dark interior, and enters through the hole back into the abandoned structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the claustrophobic darkness of an abandoned interior out into a desolate rural night before returning into another ruined structure. It begins in a pitch-black corridor, moving past broken window frames toward a doorway that leads outside. As the camera emerges from the building, the scene opens into a wide field of dense overgrown grass and dead trees under a dark blue sky, with a flashlight cutting through the gloom to illuminate the path. The movement continues across the landscape toward a distant brick house, passing a wooden fence and tracing the exterior of the damaged walls. Finally, the camera approaches a large breach in the brickwork and glides through the hole, transitioning from the open night air back into a dark interior.
